elements.name: Title
texts: "Multitudes of the lower classes of the native Irish"

elements.name: Description
texts: On the crowds of pilgrims travelling to the site and their motivations

elements.name: Source
texts: Pastoral Annals. By an Irish Clergyman [i.e. James S. Knox], p. 377

elements.name: Publisher
texts: R. B. Seeley and W. Burnside, London

elements.name: Contributor
texts: Digitised by Google, sponsored by Princeton Library

elements.name: Text
texts: "To this holy spot, dear to the national memory by many a fabulous legend, or wild tradition, multitudes of the lower classes of the native Irish still resort, during the months of June, July, and August, of each year."
